title: Bridge Essay: Interoception, network physiology and the emergence of bodily self-awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Interoception,, network, physiology, and, the.

**Interoception, network physiology and the emergence of bodily self-awareness.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 39208877. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2024.105864. The interplay between the brain and interoceptive signals is key in maintaining internal balance and orchestrating neural dynamics, encompassing influences on perceptual and self-awareness. Central to this interplay is the differentiation between the external world, others and the self, acornerstone in the construction of bodily self-awareness. This review synthesizes physiological and behavioral evidence illustrating how interoceptive signals can mediate or influence bodily self-awareness, by
